artifacts.summary: Comprehensive analysis of algebraic base completeness infrastructure. Found task 986 has 2 sorries (forward_F/backward_P) blocking direct path. Identified CanonicalMCS as sorry-free alternative but with type mismatch (Preorder vs AddCommGroup). Recommends semantic equivalence approach or completing task 986 dovetailing.

findings.primary_blocker: Task 986 has 2 sorries (intFMCS_forward_F, intFMCS_backward_P) that prevent constructing temporally coherent BFMCS Int
findings.type_mismatch_clarification: CanonicalWorldState and ParametricCanonicalWorldState are identical. Real mismatch is D=Int (needs group) vs D=CanonicalMCS (sorry-free but only Preorder)
viable_paths: Path A: Complete task 986 dovetailing construction (~4-6 hours)
Path B: Semantic equivalence argument using CanonicalMCS completeness
